untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'standard TA pattern' which is conceptually vague and cannot be operationalized with allowed indicators. The core logic is inverse/opposite of traditional patterns, but without a specific pattern definition (e.g., head-and-shoulders, double top), it cannot be translated to concrete conditions. Additionally, the signal lacks specific entry triggers beyond 'take opposite position immediately' without defining what pattern triggers this. The pattern_strength_threshold parameter and lookback_confirmation_bars cannot be meaningfully mapped to standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This signal represents a meta-analytical approach (testing inverse of TA patterns) rather than a specific tradeable rule. A practical implementation would require: (1) specific pattern definitions, (2) pattern detection logic, and (3) clarity on which traditional pattern to invert. The example shown uses MA crosses as a placeholder inverse signal, but this does not capture the full intent of the Aronson principle of testing contrary hypotheses.
